continuation_request.label: post-inbound continuation
continuation_request.purpose: Request the next cycle of the Hamut'ay event-loop to continue probe execution. This continuation carries forward the acknowledged inbound IPC state and readiness posture, allowing the framework to schedule further work or present the next terminal surface.

content.inbound_status: acknowledged; inbound message event 7d0c369b received and processed; self-scheduled reflection from cycle 1 completed; no open items to carry forward
